name: @websitelabs/software-teams-cockpit
description: Software Teams Cockpit — an Electron desktop app that opens a live team of Software Teams agents as terminal panes you lead.

scripts.build:main: bun build src/main/main.ts --target=node --format=esm --external electron --external node-pty --outfile dist/main.mjs
scripts.build:renderer: bun build src/renderer/renderer.ts --target=browser --outfile dist/renderer.js && bun run copy:assets
scripts.build: bun run build:main && bun run build:preload && bun run build:renderer
scripts.build:engine: bun run --cwd ../../packages/team-engine build:proxy && bun run --cwd ../../packages/team-engine build:hook
scripts.dev: bun run build:engine && bun run build && electron dist/main.mjs
